response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills, but his background leans heavily toward senior-level roles with deep specialization in AI-agent infrastructure and high-performance systems. While his technical skills align well, his recent experience (Staff/ Senior roles) may be overqualified for a junior/mid-level position, and his focus on low-latency systems or AI tools may not directly match the renewable energy/construction tech stack. However, his pragmatic approach and learning agility justify a closer look.
strengths: Strong fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple industries
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly
Experience with pragmatic architecture and scalable solutions in diverse domains
concerns: Recent roles (Staff/Senior) suggest potential overqualification for a junior/mid-level position
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL or Kubernetes in recent roles (most recent Kubernetes use was in 2016)
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his preference for diverse, global projects
